subject: PagedAttention
truth: Stop using PagedAttention; it has been deleted now that V1/MRv2 backends are the standard path.
quote: PagedAttention has been removed (#47361). The legacy attention implementation is deleted now that V1/MRv2 backends are the standard path.

subject: Model Runner V2 (MRv2)
old: Model Runner V1 was the default for dense models
new: Model Runner V2 is now the default for all dense models
truth: Model Runner V2 is now the default execution path for all dense models; code relying on MRv1 defaults will now use MRv2.
quote: Model Runner V2 is now the default for all dense models (#44443). Building on quantized-model support from the previous release, MRv2 is now the standard execution path

from_fact: model runner v1 was the default for dense models
model runner v2 is now the default for all dense models

subject: Model Runner V2
old: Model Runner V1 was default for dense models
new: Model Runner V2 is now default for all dense models
truth: Model Runner V2 is now the default for all dense models; code relying on V1 defaults will silently use V2.
quote: Model Runner V2: default for all dense models (#44443)

from_fact: model runner v1 was default for dense models
model runner v2 is now default for all dense models

subject: FlashAttention block-size restriction
old: FlashAttention had a block-size restriction for hybrid models
new: FlashAttention block-size restriction removed for hybrid models
truth: FlashAttention block-size restriction is removed for hybrid models; existing code that relied on the restriction may behave differently.
quote: FlashAttention block-size restriction removed for hybrid models (#36701)

flashattention block-size restriction removed for hybrid models

old: GPTBigCode/Starcoder2 and RoBERTa used previous backend
new: GPTBigCode/Starcoder2 and RoBERTa migrated to Transformers backend
truth: GPTBigCode/Starcoder2 and RoBERTa models are migrated to the Transformers backend; existing model configurations or custom code may break.

gptbigcode/starcoder2 and roberta migrated to transformers backend

new: Voxtral migrated to mistral-common 1.11.5 audio API
truth: Voxtral is migrated to mistral-common 1.11.5 audio API; existing Voxtral audio code using the old API will break.

from_fact: voxtral migrated to mistral-common 1.11.5 audio api

old: MiniMax-M3 used Triton kernels for sparse selection
new: MiniMax-M3 uses tok_sparse_select from MSA replacing Triton kernels

quote: tok_sparse_select from MSA replacing Triton kernels (#47502)

minimax-m3 uses tok_sparse_select from msa replacing triton kernels

truth: Stop using PagedAttention; it has been deleted entirely.

truth: Stop using the Baichuan model; it has been removed.

truth: Stop using the Aquila model; it has been removed.

truth: Stop using the Tarsier or Tarsier2 model; they have been removed.

truth: Stop using the Mantis model; it has been removed.

new: new FP8 online MoE quantization class

subject: legacy api_server.py
truth: Stop using the legacy api_server.py from its original location; it has been moved to the examples directory.

subject: gptq_marlin from ROCm quant schemes
truth: Stop using gptq_marlin quantization scheme on ROCm; it has been removed from supported ROCm quant schemes.
quote: `gptq_marlin` removed from supported ROCm quant schemes (#46655)

subject: Rust frontend TLS
truth: The Rust frontend TLS implementation switched from rustls to native-tls/OpenSSL; existing rustls-based configurations may break.
quote: Rust frontend TLS switched from rustls to native-tls/OpenSSL (#46696)

subject: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES environment variable
new: vLLM no longer sets CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES internally; use device_ids argument instead
truth: Stop relying on vLLM to set CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES; pass device_ids argument explicitly instead.
quote: vLLM no longer sets CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES internally; a new device_ids argument is provided instead (#45026). On ROCm, a deprecation window for CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES has begun (#46636).

from_fact: vllm no longer sets cuda_visible_devices internally; use device_ids argument instead

subject: Model Runner V2 (MRv2)
old: MRv2 did not support quantized models by default
new: MRv2 supports quantized models by default
truth: MRv2 now enables quantized models by default, which may change memory usage or behavior for existing quantized model setups.
quote: MRv2 now supports quantized models by default (#44446)

from_fact: mrv2 did not support quantized models by default
mrv2 supports quantized models by default

subject: Gemma4 parsers
truth: Stop using legacy Gemma4 parsers; they have been replaced with an engine-based implementation.

subject: P2pNcclConnector
truth: Stop using P2pNcclConnector; it has been removed.

subject: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES handling
new: vLLM no longer sets CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES internally; use device_ids arg instead
truth: Stop relying on vLLM setting CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES internally; pass device_ids argument instead.

subject: Expert parallel load balancing (EPLB)
truth: Stop using NCCL-based EPLB; it is rejected in favor of async EPLB.
quote: reject NCCL-based EPLB with async EPLB (#44978)

subject: FP8 weight layout
old: FP8 weight layout was (N, K) or unspecified
new: FP8 weight layout canonicalized to (K, N)
truth: FP8 weight layout is now canonicalized to (K, N); code that assumed a different layout will silently produce wrong results.
quote: FP8 weight layout canonicalized to (K, N) (#44735)

from_fact: fp8 weight layout was (n, k) or unspecified
fp8 weight layout canonicalized to (k, n)

subject: ROCm GPU device selection
truth: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES is deprecated on ROCm; code relying on it to select devices will break.
quote: deprecation window begun for CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES on ROCm (#46636)

subject: GGUF quantization
new: GGUF quantization is now a plugin
truth: GGUF quantization has been migrated to a plugin; existing GGUF loading code may break if the plugin is not installed.
quote: GGUF quantization migrated to a plugin (#39612)

from_fact: gguf quantization is now a plugin

subject: Chat Completions tool calling
truth: Tool calling in Chat Completions now uses strict mode by default, which may reject previously accepted tool call payloads.
quote: Strict mode for tool calling in Chat Completions (#45003) and Responses API (#45396)

subject: Chat responses tool_calls field
old: tool_calls field included empty arrays in responses
new: empty tool_calls arrays are omitted from chat responses
truth: Empty tool_calls arrays are now omitted from chat responses, which may break code that expects the field to always be present.
quote: omit empty tool_calls from chat responses (#44105)

from_fact: tool_calls field included empty arrays in responses
empty tool_calls arrays are omitted from chat responses

subject: Anthropic Messages API tool_use argument handling
truth: A fix for tool_use argument-dropping in the Anthropic Messages API changes how tool_use arguments are handled, potentially altering previously working tool call payloads.

subject: Cohere /v2/embed input validation
old: no exclusivity validation on Cohere /v2/embed inputs
new: strict exclusivity validation on Cohere /v2/embed inputs
truth: Cohere /v2/embed now validates input exclusivity, which may reject previously accepted input combinations.

from_fact: no exclusivity validation on cohere /v2/embed inputs
strict exclusivity validation on cohere /v2/embed inputs

subject: Rerank top_n validation
truth: Rerank top_n now requires non-negative values; negative values that previously worked will now be rejected.

subject: Matryoshka embedding dimension bounds
old: no bounds validation on matryoshka embedding dimensions
new: bounds validation on matryoshka embedding dimensions
truth: Matryoshka embedding dimensions now have enforced bounds, which may reject previously accepted dimension values.

from_fact: no bounds validation on matryoshka embedding dimensions
bounds validation on matryoshka embedding dimensions

subject: temperature parameter validation
truth: Non-finite temperature values (NaN, Inf) are now rejected, which will break code that previously passed such values.

subject: repetition_penalty parameter validation
truth: Non-finite repetition_penalty values (NaN, Inf) are now rejected, which will break code that previously passed such values.

subject: Starlette dependency minimum version
truth: Starlette dependency now requires version ≥ 1.0.1; older versions are no longer compatible.
quote: Upgrade Starlette to ≥ 1.0.1 to fix CVE-2026-48710 (#45675)

subject: mistral_common dependency
new: mistral_common is now optional via deferred import
truth: mistral_common is now optional and imported lazily; code that relied on it being always available may break if it's not installed.
quote: mistral_common is now optional via deferred import (#45305)

from_fact: mistral_common is now optional via deferred import

subject: CUDA Dockerfiles GCC version
truth: CUDA Dockerfiles now use GCC 12 instead of GCC 10 for C++20 support; custom Docker builds relying on GCC 10 may break.
quote: CUDA Dockerfiles upgraded from GCC 10 to GCC 12 for C++20 (#44923)

subject: spinloop extension
old: spinloop extension was built on Python < 3.11
new: spinloop extension is skipped on Python < 3.11
truth: The spinloop extension is now skipped on Python versions below 3.11, which may change behavior for Python 3.10 and earlier.

from_fact: spinloop extension was built on python < 3.11
spinloop extension is skipped on python < 3.11

truth: Stop using the Mono-InternVL model; it has been removed.

new: DeepSeek-V4 sparse MLA metadata is now decoupled from DeepSeek-V3.2

subject: OlmoHybridForCausalLM checkpoint
truth: OlmoHybridForCausalLM checkpoints now have rope_parameters set to {"rope_type": None} instead of None, which broke initialization until fixed.
quote: Fix OlmoHybridForCausalLM failing to initialise after the checkpoint changed rope_parameters from None to {"rope_type": None}

subject: HyperCLOVAX model loading
old: HyperCLOVAX loaded via remote code (auto_map) from upstream HuggingFace repo
new: HyperCLOVAX is now native in transformers >= 5.9.0; vLLM uses its vendored config instead of stale auto_map
truth: HyperCLOVAX no longer uses remote code from upstream HuggingFace repo; vLLM now registers the hyperclovax model_type and uses its vendored config, requiring transformers >= 5.9.0.
quote: Fix HyperCLOVAX loading after the upstream HuggingFace repo removed its remote code (now native in transformers >= 5.9.0): register the hyperclovax model_type so vLLM uses its vendored config instead of the stale auto_map

from_fact: hyperclovax loaded via remote code (auto_map) from upstream huggingface repo

subject: Multi-node Ray data-parallel serving with num_api_servers > 1
old: Deferred (kernel-assigned) port allocation was used for Ray DP backend
new: Ray DP backend is excluded from deferred port allocation
truth: Multi-node Ray data-parallel serving with num_api_servers > 1 no longer uses deferred (kernel-assigned) port allocation, fixing a deterministic hang.
quote: Fix a deterministic hang in multi-node Ray data-parallel serving with num_api_servers > 1 by excluding the Ray DP backend from the deferred (kernel-assigned) port allocation introduced in #42585

from_fact: deferred (kernel-assigned) port allocation was used for ray dp backend
ray dp backend is excluded from deferred port allocation

subject: NIXL KV-connector wheel install
old: All NIXL wheels were kept during install
new: Only the wheel matching the image's CUDA major version is kept

quote: Normalize NIXL KV-connector wheel installs so only the wheel matching the image's CUDA major is kept, fixing ImportError: libcudart.so.12 when importing nixl_ep on CUDA 13 images

from_fact: all nixl wheels were kept during install
only the wheel matching the image's cuda major version is kept

new: FlashInfer metadata for Qwen2.5-VL vision attention (#42787)
truth: Stop relying on the previous FlashInfer metadata behavior for Qwen2.5-VL vision attention; it has been changed.
quote: FlashInfer metadata for Qwen2.5-VL vision attention (#42787)

from_fact: flashinfer metadata behavior for qwen2.5-vl vision attention
flashinfer metadata for qwen2.5-vl vision attention (#42787)

subject: Speculative decoding custom callable proposer backend
truth: Stop relying on the previous custom callable proposer backend behavior for speculative decoding; it has been changed.

subject: Speculative decoding post-norm EAGLE-3 speculators
truth: Stop relying on the previous EAGLE-3 speculators behavior; it has been changed to post-norm.

subject: Speculative decoding peagle speculators
truth: Stop relying on the previous peagle speculators behavior; it has been changed.

subject: Speculative decoding hybrid-attention models in extract_hidden_states
truth: Stop relying on the previous hybrid-attention models behavior in extract_hidden_states for speculative decoding; it has been changed.

subject: Speculative decoding non-MTP speculation for NemotronH
truth: Stop relying on the previous non-MTP speculation behavior for NemotronH; it has been changed.

subject: Speculative decoding shared MTP weights in MRv2
old: shared MTP weights behavior in MRv2
truth: Stop relying on the previous shared MTP weights behavior in MRv2 for speculative decoding; it has been changed.

from_fact: shared mtp weights behavior in mrv2

subject: Qwen3.5/3.6 runai-streamer weight loading
truth: Stop relying on the previous runai-streamer weight loading behavior for Qwen3.5/MTP/Qwen3-VL; it has been changed.

subject: EXAONE-4.5 aligned with Transformers update
truth: Stop relying on the previous EXAONE-4.5 behavior; it has been aligned with a Transformers update.

subject: torch.accelerator.synchronize() call in EPLB
truth: The torch.accelerator.synchronize() call in EPLB has been removed; code that depended on that synchronization may now race or behave incorrectly.

subject: GPTQ quantization config key
truth: Stop using 'gptq_marlin' as the quantization config key; use 'auto_gptq' instead.

subject: OpenAI response field name for reasoning content
truth: Stop using 'reasoning_content' in OpenAI endpoint responses; use 'reasoning' instead.

subject: get_tokenizer function location
truth: The old import location of 'get_tokenizer' has been removed; use its new location.

subject: resolve_hf_chat_template function location
truth: The old import location of 'resolve_hf_chat_template' has been removed; use its new location.

subject: deprecated MLA prefill arguments
truth: Deprecated MLA prefill arguments have been removed and will no longer be accepted.

subject: dead CUDA kernels
truth: Dead CUDA kernels have been removed from the codebase.
quote: Removed dead CUDA kernels and dead code (#42767, #42889, #43144).

subject: environment variables for MoE/linear backend
truth: Environment variables that were previously used to configure MoE and linear backends are now deprecated in favor of the --moe-backend and --linear-backend CLI flags.
quote: Marked env vars now covered by `--moe-backend` / `--linear-backend` (#43148).

subject: transformers v4 support
truth: Stop using transformers v4; migrate to transformers v5 as v4 is now deprecated.
quote: This release formally deprecates `transformers` v4 support (#40389). Users should migrate to `transformers` v5.

subject: C++ build requirement
truth: Building vLLM now requires a C++20-compatible compiler; older compilers will fail to build.
quote: vLLM now requires a C++20-compatible compiler for compatibility with PyTorch (#40380). This is a **breaking build change**.

subject: FlashInfer top-k/top-p sampler
truth: FlashInfer top-k/top-p sampler is now enabled by default, which may change sampling behavior for existing deployments.
quote: FlashInfer top-k/top-p sampler enabled by default (#40376)

subject: NIXL connector version
truth: NIXL connector has been bumped to 1.x, which may break compatibility with existing 0.x deployments.

subject: DeepEP API
truth: DeepEP API has been updated, which may break existing code using the old API.

subject: FlashInfer FP8 attention autotune
truth: FlashInfer FP8 attention autotune has been temporarily disabled for correctness, which may change performance characteristics.
quote: FlashInfer autotune temporarily disabled for correctness (#41524)

subject: FlexAttention batch invariant mode
truth: FlexAttention has been re-enabled for batch invariant mode, which may change behavior for code that relied on it being disabled.
quote: FlexAttention: Re-enabled for batch invariant mode (#40842)

subject: MLA prefill backends
truth: MLA prefill backends have been abstracted and the cuDNN dependency has been eliminated, which may break code relying on cuDNN-specific behavior.
quote: Abstracted MLA prefill backends, eliminated cuDNN dependency (#32623)

subject: Compressed tensors config validation
truth: Compressed tensors now allow configs with non-explicit ignores, which may silently change behavior for previously-invalid configurations.
quote: Compressed tensors: Allow configs with non-explicit ignores (#41965)

subject: FP8 bias loading
truth: FP8 bias loading has been fixed, which may change behavior for models that previously loaded with incorrect bias values.

subject: C++ standard requirement
truth: C++20 is now required for PyTorch compatibility; building vLLM with an older C++ standard will fail.
quote: Breaking: C++20 required for PyTorch compatibility (#40380).

subject: Transformers library version
truth: Transformers v4 is deprecated and no longer supported; code relying on Transformers v4 APIs will break.

subject: CUDA default version
truth: Default CUDA wheel on PyPI and the vllm/vllm-openai:v0.20.0 image now uses CUDA 13.0; use --torch-backend=cu129 if on CUDA 12.9.
quote: Default CUDA wheel on PyPI and `vllm/vllm-openai:v0.20.0` image switched to CUDA 13.0

subject: PyTorch version requirement
truth: vLLM now ships on PyTorch 2.11 for CUDA and XPU; XPU is no longer pinned to 2.10, breaking environments that require PyTorch 2.10.
quote: vLLM ships on torch 2.11 for CUDA, and XPU is now also on torch 2.11 (#37947) — XPU is no longer pinned to 2.10. This is a breaking change for environment dependency.

subject: Transformers minimum version
truth: vLLM now requires HuggingFace transformers>=5, breaking any code that depends on transformers v4.

subject: SharedFusedMoE class
truth: SharedFusedMoE has been removed; use SharedExperts class instead.

subject: make_expert_params_mapping function
new: renamed (new name not specified in text)
truth: make_expert_params_mapping has been renamed; existing imports will break.

from_fact: renamed (new name not specified in text)

subject: MoE DP chunking
truth: MoE DP chunking has been removed; code relying on it will break.

subject: Default MLA prefill backend
truth: FlashAttention 4 is now the default MLA prefill backend; code relying on the previous default backend may behave differently.
quote: FA4 re-enabled as the default MLA prefill backend

subject: experts_int8 quantization path
truth: experts_int8 has been consolidated into the FP8 online quantization path; the standalone experts_int8 path is gone.
quote: experts_int8 consolidated into the FP8 online path (#38463)

subject: Qwen3 MoE
new: Qwen3 MoE no longer calls gate twice
truth: Qwen3 MoE no longer calls gate twice, which may break code that relied on the double-gating behaviour or its side effects.
quote: Qwen3 MoE no longer calls gate twice (#40664)

from_fact: qwen3 moe no longer calls gate twice

subject: NemotronH default cache dtype
old: NemotronH default mamba_ssm_cache_dtype was not float32
new: NemotronH default mamba_ssm_cache_dtype is now float32
truth: NemotronH now defaults to mamba_ssm_cache_dtype=float32, which may change memory usage and numerical behaviour for existing code that relied on the previous default.

from_fact: nemotronh default mamba_ssm_cache_dtype was not float32
nemotronh default mamba_ssm_cache_dtype is now float32

subject: DeepSeek V2-Lite accuracy
old: DeepSeek V2-Lite had an accuracy drop
truth: DeepSeek V2-Lite accuracy drop has been fixed, which may change model outputs for existing code that was working around or relying on the previous inaccurate behaviour.

from_fact: deepseek v2-lite had an accuracy drop

subject: CUDAGraph memory profiling
old: CUDAGraph memory profiling was off by default
new: CUDAGraph memory profiling is on by default
truth: CUDAGraph memory profiling is now enabled by default, which may increase startup memory usage.
quote: CUDAGraph memory profiling on by default (#38284)

from_fact: cudagraph memory profiling was off by default
cudagraph memory profiling is on by default

subject: KV connector priority
old: Internal registry was checked before KV connector
new: KV connector is now prioritized over internal registry
truth: KV connector is now prioritized over the internal registry for KV lookups, which may change which KV data is retrieved.
quote: KV connector prioritized over internal registry (#38301)

from_fact: internal registry was checked before kv connector
kv connector is now prioritized over internal registry

subject: concat_mla_q data types
new: concat_mla_q now only accepts half-precision types
truth: concat_mla_q now only accepts half-precision types (e.g. float16, bfloat16); passing other types will fail.

from_fact: concat_mla_q now only accepts half-precision types

subject: Ray executor
old: RayExecutorV1 was the default Ray executor
new: RayExecutorV2 is now introduced and replaces V1
truth: RayExecutorV2 is now introduced; the old RayExecutor (V1) is replaced and may break existing Ray-based deployments.

from_fact: rayexecutorv1 was the default ray executor
rayexecutorv2 is now introduced and replaces v1

subject: API server handshake
old: API server handshake was more complex
truth: API server handshake has been simplified, which may break clients relying on the previous handshake protocol.

from_fact: api server handshake was more complex

subject: eagle-draft piecewise fallback
truth: Eagle-draft piecewise fallback is now disabled, which may cause draft generation to fail or behave differently in edge cases.

subject: SWA/chunked-local runtime admission
old: SWA/chunked-local runtime admission was not capped to startup pool-sizing bound
new: SWA/chunked-local runtime admission is now capped to startup pool-sizing bound
truth: SWA/chunked-local runtime admission is now capped to the startup pool-sizing bound, which may reject requests that previously would have been admitted.
quote: SWA/chunked-local runtime admission capped to startup pool-sizing bound (#40946)

from_fact: swa/chunked-local runtime admission was not capped to startup pool-sizing bound
swa/chunked-local runtime admission is now capped to startup pool-sizing bound

subject: shared-expert overlap
truth: Shared-expert overlap has been restored, which may change performance characteristics and scheduling behavior.

subject: CONFIG_REGISTRY config-class lookup
old: CONFIG_REGISTRY lookup could fail when on-disk model_type differs
new: CONFIG_REGISTRY config-class lookup is fixed for differing on-disk model_type
truth: CONFIG_REGISTRY config-class lookup now correctly handles cases where on-disk model_type differs, which may change which config class is selected.
quote: CONFIG_REGISTRY config-class lookup fix when on-disk model_type differs (#39554)

from_fact: config_registry lookup could fail when on-disk model_type differs
config_registry config-class lookup is fixed for differing on-disk model_type

subject: workspace-resize GPU memory
old: workspace-resize had a GPU memory leak
new: workspace-resize GPU memory leak is fixed
truth: Workspace-resize GPU memory leak has been fixed, which may reduce GPU memory usage and change memory availability.

from_fact: workspace-resize had a gpu memory leak
workspace-resize gpu memory leak is fixed

subject: stale sampled/draft tokens accuracy
old: stale sampled/draft tokens had accuracy issues
new: stale sampled/draft tokens accuracy is fixed
truth: Stale sampled/draft tokens accuracy has been fixed, which may change output quality and token selection behavior.

from_fact: stale sampled/draft tokens had accuracy issues
stale sampled/draft tokens accuracy is fixed

subject: Sequence Parallelism for piecewise compilation
old: Sequence Parallelism was enabled for piecewise compilation
new: Sequence Parallelism is disabled for piecewise compilation
truth: Sequence Parallelism is now disabled for piecewise compilation, which may break models that relied on it during piecewise compilation.
quote: disable Sequence Parallelism for piecewise compilation (#38373)

from_fact: sequence parallelism was enabled for piecewise compilation
sequence parallelism is disabled for piecewise compilation

subject: MLA decode output zero-fill
old: MLA decode output had zero-fill in AITER
new: MLA decode output zero-fill removed in AITER
truth: Stop relying on zero-fill in MLA decode output from AITER; the zero-fill has been removed.
quote: MLA decode output zero-fill removed in AITER (#37539)

from_fact: mla decode output had zero-fill in aiter
mla decode output zero-fill removed in aiter

subject: score-correction-bias dtype cast for DeepSeek/Kimi-K2
old: score-correction-bias dtype was not cast (or cast differently)
new: score-correction-bias dtype cast is now applied for DeepSeek/Kimi-K2
truth: A dtype cast is now applied to score-correction-bias for DeepSeek/Kimi-K2 models; existing code that assumed no cast may silently produce wrong scores.

from_fact: score-correction-bias dtype was not cast (or cast differently)
score-correction-bias dtype cast is now applied for deepseek/kimi-k2

subject: Lustre FS checkpoint prefetching
old: Lustre FS checkpoint prefetching was disabled by default
new: Lustre FS checkpoint prefetching is now enabled by default
truth: Lustre FS checkpoint prefetching is now enabled by default; existing workloads that relied on the previous non-prefetching behaviour may see different I/O patterns or memory usage.
quote: Lustre FS checkpoint prefetching enabled by default (#39422)

from_fact: lustre fs checkpoint prefetching was disabled by default
lustre fs checkpoint prefetching is now enabled by default

subject: Intel XPU torch version
old: Intel XPU was pinned to torch 2.10
truth: Intel XPU is no longer pinned to torch 2.10 and now uses torch 2.11; code depending on the old torch version may break.
quote: torch 2.11 upgrade for XPU (#37947) — no longer pinned to 2.10

from_fact: intel xpu was pinned to torch 2.10

subject: fusion-pattern support on XPU
old: fusion-pattern support was enabled on XPU
new: fusion-pattern support is now disabled on XPU
truth: Fusion-pattern support is now disabled on XPU; any code relying on fusion patterns on XPU will no longer work.

from_fact: fusion-pattern support was enabled on xpu
fusion-pattern support is now disabled on xpu

subject: Petit NVFP4
truth: Stop using Petit NVFP4; it has been removed.

subject: WideEP communication pattern
truth: Stop using naive all2all for WideEP; replace with allgather + reducescatter.
quote: Naive all2all replaced by allgather + reducescatter (#33728).

subject: TpKVTopology and HeteroTPTransferConfig
truth: Stop using TpKVTopology and HeteroTPTransferConfig; use the unified TransferTopology instead.
quote: Full PD support for Mamba2-like models on Heterogeneous TP deployments (#37635), Nixl bumped to 0.10.1 (#39922), `TpKVTopology` + `HeteroTPTransferConfig` unified into `TransferTopology` (#39529), NIXL EP treated as batc

subject: asyncio infrastructure from Async EPLB
truth: Stop relying on asyncio infrastructure in Async EPLB; it has been removed.
quote: Alternative communication for EPLB weight exchange (#33176), nixl-based EPLB communicator (#36276), mapping optimization with router record for prefill (#36261), `TransferMetadata` consolidation (#37341), Async EPLB sync

subject: PoolerConfig logit_bias/logit_scale
truth: Stop using logit_bias and logit_scale in PoolerConfig; use logit_mean and logit_sigma instead for affine score calibration.
quote: `logit_scale` added to PoolerConfig (#39435), then renamed `logit_bias`/`logit_scale` → `logit_mean`/`logit_sigma` for affine score calibration (#39530) — breaking.

associative: what are the pooling config fields

subject: LLM.reward
truth: Stop using LLM.reward; use LLM.encode instead.

subject: vllm:prompt_tokens_recomputed metric
truth: Stop using the vllm:prompt_tokens_recomputed metric; it has been removed.

subject: num_cached_tokens / num_external_computed_tokens metrics
truth: Stop using num_cached_tokens and num_external_computed_tokens; use PrefillStats instead.

subject: Pooler config logit_bias / logit_scale
truth: Stop using logit_bias and logit_scale in pooler config; use logit_mean and logit_sigma instead.

subject: Async scheduling default for pooling models
old: async scheduling default ON for pooling models
new: async scheduling default OFF for pooling models
truth: Async scheduling is now OFF by default for pooling models; you must explicitly enable it if needed.
quote: Async scheduling default OFF for pooling models (#39592)

from_fact: async scheduling default on for pooling models
async scheduling default off for pooling models

subject: CUDAGraph memory profiling default
old: CUDAGraph memory profiling OFF by default
new: CUDAGraph memory profiling ON by default
truth: CUDAGraph memory profiling is now ON by default, changing startup memory accounting.
quote: CUDAGraph memory profiling now ON by default (#38284) — startup memory accounting changes.

from_fact: cudagraph memory profiling off by default
cudagraph memory profiling on by default

subject: Petit NVFP4 quantization
truth: Petit NVFP4 quantization has been removed; stop using it.

subject: LLM.reward API
truth: Stop using LLM.reward; it is deprecated — use LLM.encode instead.

subject: cprofile / cprofile_context
truth: cprofile and cprofile_context are deprecated and should not be used.

subject: V0 accept output buffer in attention
truth: The V0 accept output buffer in attention is deprecated; stop using it.

subject: Mamba cache mode with speculative decoding
new: Mamba default cache mode is 'align' when speculative decoding is enabled
truth: Mamba-based models now default to 'align' cache mode when speculative decoding is enabled, which may change memory layout or behaviour.
quote: Mamba: default to 'align' cache mode for Mamba-based models when speculative decoding is enabled (#40454)

from_fact: mamba default cache mode is 'align' when speculative decoding is enabled

subject: PyTorch minimum version
truth: PyTorch 2.11 is now the minimum required version for CUDA and XPU; older versions are unsupported.

subject: CUDA minimum version
truth: CUDA 13.0 (13.0.2) is now the default; older CUDA versions may not be supported.
quote: CUDA 13.0 default with updated architecture lists and cleaned build-args (#39878); CUDA bumped to 13.0.2 to match PyTorch 2.11.0 (#40669)

subject: Transformers minimum version
truth: Transformers v5 is now the supported baseline; v4 is no longer supported.
quote: Transformers v5 (#30566), with vision-encoder torch.compile bypass (#30518) and continued v4/v5 compat fixes.

subject: Triton autotuning disk cache
old: Triton autotuning disk cache was disabled by default
new: Triton autotuning disk cache is enabled by default
truth: Stop relying on Triton autotuning disk cache being off by default; it is now enabled by default and will use disk cache automatically.
quote: Triton autotuning disk cache enabled by default (#37188)

from_fact: triton autotuning disk cache was disabled by default
triton autotuning disk cache is enabled by default

subject: Inductor runtime asserts
old: Inductor runtime asserts were enabled by default
new: Inductor runtime asserts are disabled by default
truth: Stop relying on Inductor runtime asserts being enabled by default; they are now disabled by default, so runtime errors may silently pass without assertion checks.
quote: inductor runtime asserts disabled by default (#37485)

from_fact: inductor runtime asserts were enabled by default
inductor runtime asserts are disabled by default

subject: Per-tensor-per-channel FP8
truth: Stop using per-tensor-per-channel FP8; it has been removed.

subject: Sparse24 integration and kernels
truth: Stop using Sparse24 integration and kernels; they have been removed.

subject: reasoning_content message field
truth: Stop using the reasoning_content message field as it has been removed from responses.

subject: score task
truth: Stop using the 'score' task as it has been deprecated.

subject: pooling multi-task support
truth: Stop using pooling multi-task support as it has been deprecated.

subject: --calculate-kv-scales flag
truth: Stop using the --calculate-kv-scales flag as it has been deprecated.

subject: librosa audio dependency
truth: Stop relying on librosa being available as an audio dependency since it has been removed.

subject: KV cache structure
old: KV cache stored as a list
new: KV cache stored as an element (non-list)
truth: The KV cache has been refactored from a list to an element, so any code accessing it as a list will break.
quote: Refactor KV cache from list to element (#37487)

from_fact: kv cache stored as a list
kv cache stored as an element (non-list)

subject: virtual engine
truth: Stop using the virtual engine as it has been deprecated.

subject: --disable-frontend-multiprocessing flag
truth: Stop using the --disable-frontend-multiprocessing flag as it has been deprecated.

subject: SM100 MLA prefill backend default
old: default SM100 MLA prefill backend (presumably some non-TRT-LLM backend)
truth: The default SM100 MLA prefill backend is now TRT-LLM instead of the previous default.
quote: Change default SM100 MLA prefill backend back to TRT-LLM (#38562)

from_fact: default sm100 mla prefill backend (presumably some non-trt-llm backend)

subject: monolithic TRTLLM MoE for Renormalize routing
old: monolithic TRTLLM MoE was enabled for Renormalize routing
new: monolithic TRTLLM MoE is disabled for Renormalize routing
truth: Monolithic TRTLLM MoE is now disabled for Renormalize routing; code relying on it being enabled will silently fall back to a different MoE path.
quote: Disable monolithic TRTLLM MoE for Renormalize routing #37605

from_fact: monolithic trtllm moe was enabled for renormalize routing
monolithic trtllm moe is disabled for renormalize routing

subject: Ray as default dependency
old: Ray was a default dependency of vLLM
truth: Stop relying on Ray being installed automatically with vLLM; install it explicitly if needed.
quote: Ray has been removed as a default dependency (#36170) — install it explicitly if needed.

from_fact: ray was a default dependency of vllm

subject: cascade attention
truth: Cascade attention is now disabled by default; you must explicitly enable it if you rely on it.

subject: chunking from FusedMoE
truth: Chunking has been removed from FusedMoE; the kernel now processes full batches only.
quote: Remove chunking from FusedMoE for full batch processing (#34086).

subject: torch.compile compilation strategy
truth: torch.compile no longer uses lazy compilation; you must adjust compilation setup if you depended on lazy behavior.

subject: Ray dependency
truth: Ray has been removed from default dependencies; you must install it explicitly if you need it.

subject: Deprecated items from v0.18
old: Deprecated APIs/features from v0.18 were still available
truth: All deprecated items from v0.18 have been removed; code relying on them will break.

from_fact: deprecated apis/features from v0.18 were still available

subject: OpenAI dependency version bound
old: OpenAI dependency was unbounded or allowed newer versions
truth: The OpenAI dependency is now pinned to version 2.24.0; newer versions of the openai package will not be used.

from_fact: openai dependency was unbounded or allowed newer versions

subject: kaldi_native_fbank dependency
truth: kaldi_native_fbank is now optional; code that implicitly depended on it being present may fail if it is not installed.

subject: Ray dependency
old: Ray was included as a default dependency
truth: Stop relying on Ray being installed automatically; install it explicitly if you need it.
quote: Ray no longer a default dependency — install explicitly if needed (#36170).

from_fact: ray was included as a default dependency

subject: Deprecated items from v0.18
old: Items deprecated in v0.18 were still available
truth: Stop using any API, parameter, or feature that was deprecated in v0.18; they have been removed.
quote: Deprecated items removed — items deprecated in v0.18 have been removed (#36470, #36006).

from_fact: items deprecated in v0.18 were still available

subject: Cascade attention
old: Cascade attention was enabled by default
new: Cascade attention is now disabled by default
truth: Cascade attention is now disabled by default; you must explicitly enable it if you need it.

from_fact: cascade attention was enabled by default
cascade attention is now disabled by default

subject: swap_space parameter
truth: Stop passing the swap_space parameter; it has been removed.

subject: Monolithic TRTLLM MoE renormalize routing
old: Monolithic TRTLLM MoE allowed renormalize routing
new: Monolithic TRTLLM MoE is disabled for renormalize routing
truth: Monolithic TRTLLM MoE is now disabled when using renormalize routing; a late fix was cherry-picked.
quote: Monolithic TRTLLM MoE disabled for renormalize routing — late fix cherry-picked (#37591).

from_fact: monolithic trtllm moe allowed renormalize routing
monolithic trtllm moe is disabled for renormalize routing

subject: PyTorch version requirement
truth: Upgrade your environment to PyTorch 2.10.0; older PyTorch versions are no longer supported.
quote: This release upgrades to **PyTorch 2.10.0**, which is a breaking change for environment dependencies.

subject: KV load failure policy
truth: KV load failure policy default changed from 'recompute' to 'fail', so any KV cache load that fails will now raise an error instead of silently recomputing.
quote: Breaking: KV load failure policy default changed from "recompute" to "fail" (#34896).

subject: generation_config max_tokens
old: max_tokens in generation_config acted as a ceiling (hard cap)
new: max_tokens in generation_config is treated as a default (can be overridden)
truth: Stop relying on generation_config max_tokens as a hard ceiling; it now acts as a default value that can be overridden per-request.
quote: generation_config max_tokens treated as default not ceiling (#34063).

from_fact: max_tokens in generation_config acted as a ceiling (hard cap)
max_tokens in generation_config is treated as a default (can be overridden)

subject: per-request logits processors
truth: Stop using per-request logits processors; they have been removed.

subject: unused MM placeholders in request output
old: unused MM placeholders were present in request output
truth: Stop relying on unused MM placeholders in request output; they have been removed.
quote: Removed unused MM placeholders in request output (#34944).

from_fact: unused mm placeholders were present in request output

subject: Swin model
truth: Stop using the Swin model; it has been removed.

subject: PyTorch version requirement
truth: Update your environment to PyTorch 2.10.0; older versions are no longer supported.
quote: PyTorch 2.10.0 upgrade — breaking change requiring environment updates. ROCm torch also updated to official 2.10 release (#34387).

subject: openai dependency version bound
truth: Pin openai to versions below 2.25.0; version 2.25.0 and above are incompatible.

subject: padding_index parameter
truth: Stop using the padding_index parameter; it has been removed for Transformers v5 compatibility.

subject: IPEX support on XPU
old: IPEX (Intel Extension for PyTorch) on XPU platform
truth: Stop using IPEX on XPU; use vllm-xpu-kernels instead as IPEX has been deprecated.

old: Cascade Attention was enabled by default or usable
new: Cascade Attention is now disabled (batch invariance)
truth: Cascade Attention is now disabled; code relying on it being active will silently use a different attention mechanism.

cascade attention is now disabled (batch invariance)

subject: BitBlas quantization backend
truth: Stop using BitBlas; it has been removed from vllm.

subject: Marlin 24 quantization kernel
truth: Stop using Marlin 24; it has been removed from vllm.

subject: Intel XPU platform kernel backend
truth: Stop using IPEX on Intel XPU; switch to vllm-xpu-kernels.
quote: Platform overhaul - deprecated IPEX, switched to vllm-xpu-kernels (#33379)

subject: BitBlas quantization
truth: Stop using BitBlas quantization; it has been removed.

subject: Marlin 24 quantization
truth: Stop using Marlin 24 quantization; it has been removed.

subject: reasoning_content message field
truth: Stop using the deprecated reasoning_content message field; it has been removed.

subject: deprecated pooling items
truth: Stop using the deprecated pooling items; they have been removed.

subject: VLLM_ALL2ALL_BACKEND environment variable
truth: Stop using the VLLM_ALL2ALL_BACKEND environment variable; it has been removed.

subject: IPEX for XPU
truth: Stop using IPEX for XPU; switch to vllm-xpu-kernels instead.
quote: Deprecated IPEX for XPU, switched to vllm-xpu-kernels (#33379)

subject: FlashInfer MLA backend on Blackwell
old: FlashInfer MLA was not the default MLA backend on Blackwell
new: FlashInfer MLA is now the default MLA backend on Blackwell, with TRTLLM as default prefill
truth: FlashInfer MLA is now the default MLA backend on Blackwell GPUs; TRTLLM is the default prefill backend.
quote: FlashInfer MLA is now the default MLA backend on Blackwell, with TRTLLM as default prefill

from_fact: flashinfer mla was not the default mla backend on blackwell
flashinfer mla is now the default mla backend on blackwell, with trtllm as default prefill

subject: Mamba prefix caching
old: Mamba prefix caching was not available or used different mode
new: Mamba prefix caching now requires --mamba-cache-mode align flag
truth: Mamba prefix caching now requires --enable-prefix-caching --mamba-cache-mode align to work; previously available caching behavior may no longer apply.
quote: Block-aligned prefix caching for Mamba/hybrid models with --enable-prefix-caching --mamba-cache-mode align

from_fact: mamba prefix caching was not available or used different mode
mamba prefix caching now requires --mamba-cache-mode align flag

subject: Async scheduling with pipeline parallelism
old: --async-scheduling did not work with pipeline parallelism
truth: --async-scheduling now works with pipeline parallelism; previously it was incompatible and may have been silently ignored or errored.

from_fact: --async-scheduling did not work with pipeline parallelism

subject: LMCache dependency version
new: LMCache is now pinned to >= v0.3.9
truth: LMCache dependency is now pinned to >= v0.3.9; older versions are incompatible and will break.
quote: Pinned LMCache >= v0.3.9 for API compatibility

from_fact: lmcache is now pinned to >= v0.3.9

subject: vllm:time_per_output_token_seconds metric
truth: Stop using the vllm:time_per_output_token_seconds metric and use vllm:inter_token_latency_seconds instead.

subject: Deprecated environment variables
truth: Stop using the deprecated environment variables that were removed.

subject: DeepSpeedFp8 quantization
truth: Stop using DeepSpeedFp8 quantization as it has been removed.

subject: RTN quantization
truth: Stop using RTN quantization as it has been removed.

subject: HQQ quantization
truth: HQQ quantization is now deprecated and will be removed in a future version.
